nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 2010; const int b = 2025; const int c = 2040; const int d = 2054; const int e = 2069; const int f = 2083; const int g = 2098; const int h = 2112; const int i = 2127; const int j = 2142; const int k = 2156; const int l = 2171; const int m = 2186; const int n = 2200; const int o = 2215; const int p = 2229; const int q = 2244; const int r = 2258; const int s = 2273; const int t = 2288; const int u = 2302; const int v = 2317; const int w = 2332; const int x = 2346; const int y = 2361;
